Uses of Interface
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer.MediaMixer

Packages that use MediaMixer
javax.media.mscontrol Provides a java Application Server with a Media Server Control API. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream. 
 

Uses of MediaMixer in javax.media.mscontrol
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol that return MediaMixer
 MediaMixer MediaSession.createMediaMixer(Configuration<MediaMixer> predefinedConfig)
          Create a MediaMixer.
 MediaMixer MediaSession.createMediaMixer(Configuration<MediaMixer> predefinedConfig, Parameters params)
          Create a MediaMixer.
 MediaMixer MediaSession.createMediaMixer(MediaConfig config, Parameters params)
          Create a MediaMixer.
 

Method parameters in javax.media.mscontrol with type arguments of type MediaMixer
 MediaMixer MediaSession.createMediaMixer(Configuration<MediaMixer> predefinedConfig)
          Create a MediaMixer.
 MediaMixer MediaSession.createMediaMixer(Configuration<MediaMixer> predefinedConfig, Parameters params)
          Create a MediaMixer.
 

Uses of MediaMixer in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
 

Fields in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer with type parameters of type MediaMixer
static Configuration<MediaMixer> MediaMixer.AUDIO
          This Configuration supports simple audio mixing.
static Configuration<MediaMixer> MediaMixer.AUDIO_EVENTS
          This Configuration supports audio mixing, plus the events related to the active talkers.
static Configuration<MediaMixer> MediaMixer.AUDIO_VIDEO
          This Configuration support mixing of audio and video.
static Configuration<MediaMixer> MediaMixer.AUDIO_VIDEO_RENDERING
          This Configuration supports the features of AUDIO_VIDEO, plus a VideoRenderer.
